overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street at night, featuring neon-lit billboards, wet reflective asphalt, elevated highways, and futuristic vehicles passing by. The scene is from a video game with cinematic quality and dense urban commercial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a concrete barrier, observing the neon-lit street and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving past on the wet road

entered.detail: large illuminated green advertisement sign on building facade
smooth concrete sidewalk barrier with metal rail
massive concrete overpass structure spanning the street
large circular red neon sign with stylized face design

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet cyberpunk street at night, with the camera walking forward along a sidewalk bordered by a concrete barrier. A prominent green neon billboard illuminates the left side while a large circular red neon sign glows in the distance. The elevated highway looms overhead, and futuristic vehicles occasionally pass by on the multi-lane road.

events.description: approaching intersection with crosswalk markings becoming visible
blue and white futuristic sports car drives through the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection while observing traffic and neon signage

notable_agents.action: blue and white futuristic sports car driving through intersection

entered.detail: series of illuminated red triangular warning signs on construction barriers
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and enters a wide urban intersection, transitioning from the narrow sidewalk to open crosswalk area. Red warning triangle signs line the right side on construction barriers. The large circular neon face sign moves closer to center view as the camera crosses the wet intersection, while various futuristic vehicles navigate the traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved street under elevated highway with striped barriers

events.description: path curves to the left following the road bend
yellow taxi-like vehicle passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved sidewalk next to yellow and black striped barriers, following the road bend

notable_agents.action: yellow futuristic taxi driving along the curved road

entered.detail: concrete barrier with diagonal yellow and black hazard stripes
tall structure covered with multiple digital advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the curve of the street, moving along a sidewalk bordered by yellow and black striped barriers. The elevated highway shifts to the left side of the frame as the path curves. Various futuristic vehicles including a yellow taxi pass by on the wet road, while dense clusters of digital billboards illuminate the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital billboards

events.description: passing by large cola advertisement billboard on left
white sports car overtakes on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking past various commercial billboards and advertisements on both sides of the street

notable_agents.action: white futuristic sports car driving past on the right

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement sign with cola branding
tall vertical structure with bright pink and red neon signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the neon-lit commercial district, passing a prominent cola billboard on the left and large vertical neon signs on the right. The elevated highway remains visible on the left overhead. The camera maintains a steady walking pace as various futuristic vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt, with dense digital advertisements covering the surrounding buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district that transitions from a narrow sidewalk into a wide, neon-drenched commercial intersection. It begins along a concrete barrier under a looming elevated highway, guided by the glow of a prominent green billboard and a distant circular red sign. As the camera moves forward, the space opens into a wide urban intersection marked by red warning triangles and crossing traffic, bringing the large circular neon sign into center view. The scene then curves along yellow and black striped barriers, shifting the highway to the left while a yellow taxi and other futuristic vehicles glide past dense clusters of digital advertisements. Finally, the path leads deeper into the commercial heart of the city, passing a large cola billboard and towering vertical neon signs that illuminate the wet asphalt.
